Name: 1_rear_interior_seats_car
Representative_Docs: ["Answer, well for the four cylinder engines we will use the S tronic transmission with seven speeds and for a six-cylinder engines we will use the already known tip tronic with eight speed transmission just for the guests S tronic and tip tronic that's a different technology isn't it yes the tip tronic is an automatic transmission while the S tronic is a dual clutch transmission now what we haven't mentioned either is the luggage compartment so question to you Christian any changes here and what what's the the volume we can offer the volume says Christian has remained unchanged and depending on whether you've got the rear seat folded down or not we can offer anything between 550 liters all the way up to 1,500 liters in trunk capacity with the rear seats folded down I'd just like to mention we've got the rear seat bench plus that can be adjusted quite to your needs and you can shift the seats in the length so extend your clearance for the knees and also of course the inclination of the seats can be adjusted that means you can adjust the comfort for those sitting in the rear for longer trips or if you need extra space in your trunk compartment you can also extend your trunk and luggage compartment with this movable rear seat bench.", 'Everyone can enjoy generous legroom and headroom, even in the rear seat. The interior design adds to a sporty, in-command driving experience. With the seats in shotgun nappa leather and nubuck textile, and the cutting-edge aluminum decor, it creates one of the four interior themes.', "With this loading position, trunk space is maximized while still allowing for rear seat passengers. The 3 Series Gran Turismo's rear seats can also be folded flat, either separately or together, thanks to their 40-20-40 design. This can be accomplished either using the adjustment handles on the rear seats or via these handles in the cargo compartment."]

Name: 6_assist_lane_parking_safety
Representative_Docs: ["That's why every grade comes standard with Toyota Safety Sense 3.0, which includes Pre-Collision System with Pedestrian Detection, Lane Departure Alert with Steering Assist, Automatic High Beams, Full Speed Range Dynamic Radar Cruise Control, Lane Tracing Assist, Road Sign Assist, and Proactive Driving Assist.", 'This updated bundle includes Pre-Collision System with Pedestrian Detection, now with Intersection Support Enhancement and a Driver Initiated Emergency Steering Assist Enhancement, Lane Departure Alert with Steering Assist, automatic high beams, full-speed range dynamic radar cruise control, now with curved speed management, lane tracing assist, and road sign assist.', "The real star of the show, however, is Toyota Safety Sense 2.5 Plus. This active safety system includes a pre-collision system with pedestrian detection, lane departure alert with steering assist, automatic high beams, full speed range dynamic radar cruise control, lane tracing assist, and road sign assist. For added visibility from the driver's seat, blind spot monitor with rear cross traffic alert is standard on the LE grade and above."]

Name: 7_mbux_display_screen_functions
Representative_Docs: ["Inside, there's an evolution of the famous operating system MBUX. It now allows you to control the vehicle functions even easier and more intuitively. All in all, you can control MBUX not only by this touchscreen, but by the touch control buttons and via voice control.", "We've removed 40% of the buttons from the center console and transferred these functions to a menu on the large screen above the center console, where these functions can now be accessed. Of course, supplemented with options for controlling the new functions. The instrument cluster features two 7-inch displays coupled with the traditional mechanical rev speed indicator in the center.", 'The Mercedes-Benz User Experience, or MBUX for short, is amazing in that it comes with four different control options. The touchpad in the center console, the touch screen in the middle display, touch control buttons on the steering wheel, or simply by voice. Hey Mercedes.']

Name: 20_bmw_i5_series_digital
Representative_Docs: ['Well, in addition to all known practical and easy products and services, BMW charging offers some very cool new features. So the plug-in hybrid BMW 5 Series and the BMW i5 come with established standard equipment, including the flexible fast charger with an updated adapter system for convenient adaptive charging at different home locations. Also included is the BMW charging card for access to a huge network of public AC, DC, and high-power charging stations.', 'But in selected markets, the fourth generation BMW Wallbox is also available from the launch of the BMW i5 and soon everywhere. Depending on the country, it is available as part of a connected home charging package, including installation by a service partner and digital smart charging services via the My BMW app. At home and in public, BMW Connected Charging offers digital charging services for advanced remote monitoring and control features via the My BMW app.', "As we've already hinted at, all the new digital features in the new BMW 5 Series and i5, as well as all their familiar ones, meet the user in a new interface with a new user experience in the standard BMW Live Cockpit Plus or optional BMW Live Cockpit Professional. BMW Operating System 8.5 shows a new control display layout focused on first level interaction and individualization of the most important features."]

Name: 22_highlander_grand highlander_grand_available
Representative_Docs: ['Choose the available Hybrid Max system. With 362 net combined horsepower and 400 pound-feet of torque, this electrified powerhouse gives Grand Highlander effortless acceleration. On top of that, Grand Highlander can tow up to 5,000 pounds, allowing drivers to bring more gear on that next road trip.', "On top of that, Grand Highlander's Hybrid and Hybrid Max models include a hybrid system warranty for 8 years or 100,000 miles, whichever comes first, and a 10-year or 150,000-mile hybrid battery warranty, whichever comes first, making them great choices for long-term ownership. With all of these factors considered, it's clear that Grand Highlander is the stylish SUV for the modern family. Want to learn more?", 'Toyota Grand Highlander redefines the family SUV with its clean, sophisticated design and impressive versatility. Featuring seating for up to eight and intuitive technologies that are designed to help keep everyone connected and safe on the road, Grand Highlander is all about making the journey fun and easy. Together with its three responsive powertrain choices, as well as the added traction of available all-wheel drive, Grand Highlander is the ultimate SUV.']
